= README =

<!-- [[w:en:User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts]] -->

Not much to see here yet...

* [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/SkinSwitcher]] – fork of [[User:Eizen/SkinSwitcher]] to choose between default desktop skins as of 2021
* [[User:ClaudineChionh/Scripts/copyPageToClipboard]]

<!-- vim: set syntax=mediawiki textwidth=0 linebreak spell spelllang=en_au,en_gb: -->
